name: Telegram MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for Telegram messaging platform. Enables AI agents to send messages, manage Telegram bots, read channel/group messages, and interact with Telegram's Bot API. Supports message sending, media attachments, and bot command handling through Telegram's official Bot API.
use_cases: Sending automated notifications and alerts via Telegram bot from monitoring agents
Reading messages from Telegram channels and groups for content aggregation agents
Building conversational Telegram bots powered by AI agents
Routing notifications from workflows to Telegram channels from automation agents
not_for: Accessing personal Telegram accounts (Bot API is for bots, not user accounts)
Mass messaging or spam (violates Telegram ToS)
Teams using Slack, Discord, or other messaging platforms
best_when: A developer or team using Telegram for communication wants AI agents to send notifications, process messages, or manage a Telegram bot — Telegram's Bot API is well-designed for automation.
avoid_when: You need access to personal Telegram account messages (not possible via Bot API without TDLib). Also not suitable for mass messaging or ToS-violating automation.

auth.notes: Telegram Bot token required. Create a bot via @BotFather to get a token. Bot must be added to target chats/channels to interact.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Telegram Bot API is completely free with generous rate limits
pricing.notes: Telegram Bot API is free and generous. MCP server is free open source. No charges for sending messages.

performance.rate_limits: 30 messages/second total, 1 message/second per chat; 20 messages/minute per group

known_agent_gotchas: Bot must be added to target chats before it can send messages — setup required
Group message rate limits (20/min) can throttle agents in busy notification scenarios
Bot API only — not for accessing personal account messages (requires TDLib for user API)
ToS: No spam, no mass messaging — agent use should be purposeful notifications only
agent_readiness.security_notes: Bot token authenticates to Telegram Bot API. HTTPS enforced. Bot token grants full bot capabilities — keep secure and rotate if compromised. Bot can only access chats it's been added to.

security_score_components.security_notes: Bot token required. HTTPS to Telegram. Bot is limited to chats it's added to. Message content transmitted through Telegram's servers.
